programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore se preguntan sobre el paradero de Dania. Chile y Diana tienen una cita romántica. Karime y Mane terminan en el hospital. Pepe y Ramiro reciben una llamada que cambia sus planes y los Shore se alistan para el carnaval.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore llegan el carnaval. Karime y Potro tienen un momento de mucha intimidad. Un hipnotizador llega a la casa. Nacha tiene sospechas y decide hacerse una prueba de embarazo y una nueva integrante llega a las vacaciones.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Karime le hacen un amarre a sus amados y Nacha explota contra Jey. Potro sorprende a Isa besando a Chile y se molesta. Mane se entera de que Potro está hablando mal de Jawy y toma cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La situación entre Jawy y Potro es cada vez más tensa. Las nuevas se lanzan topless de la tirolesa. Nacha confronta a Isa, mientras que Jawy decide que la playa es el lugar perfecto para aclarar las cosas con Potro.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Talía llega de sorpresa y los lleva de fiesta. Nacha va al hospital. Chile por fin corona con Isa. Los Shores tienen una sesión con Silvia Olmedo; Karime vuelve con Ramiro y trae ganas de trío. Entre Fer e Isa hay pleito de celos por Chile.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores se preparan para el fin de la aventura en Mazatlán. Los invitados llegan a celebrar la fiesta final. Potro y Tadeo aparecen cuando ya está el pleno desmadre y un incidente entre las mujeres de Chile está a punto de explotar.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final termina en pleito entre el harén de Chile. Mane le prepara a Jawy una ceremonia sorpresa para ratificar su amor. Los Shores se van de la casa, pero Karime y Potro dejan lo mejor para el final.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión, Acapulco será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta continua y el capitán desata la primera crisis en la casa. La tensión entre Isa y Fernanda crece con un descenlace inesperado y la llegada de Nacha sorprende a todos en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El boss aparece por primera vez. Los Shores descubren que la casa tiene un antro. La relación entre Alba y Fer se hace más fuerte mientras que Nacha le deja saber a Jacky que se le hace una falsa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El capitán regresa a la casa Shore. Un viaje en Catamarán genera un enfrentamiento entre Alba y Chile, mientras que a Fernanda le dañan una noche de pasión y Nacha explota contra Jacky.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jaylin se abre con los Shores y les cuenta su historia. El grupo se relaja en un beach club pero los problemas siguen. Jaylin y Capitán discuten y la situación entre Nacha y Jacky se sale de control.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores vuelven a la casa en autobús y lo que parecía que iba a ser un viaje relajado y divertido, se convierte en un todos contra todos. El Boss se presenta oficialmente y un nuevo integrante llega.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El Team Tendo le organiza una fiesta de 15 a su Matrioska y los Shores se entregan al festejo como solo ellos saben hacerlo. Todo es diversión hasta que una discusión inesperada excede todos los límites.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: La viuda de blanco

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro recibe una llamada de Cocó y Paloma se molesta. Cocó llega a casa de Perico y muestra su supuesto anillo de compromiso, a él le da un ataque de pánico. Ignacio le propone a Fernanda drogar a Leonardo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo descubre que Aurora no es la Princesa de hielo que todos nombran al abrir una cápsula de congelamiento que le revela verdades ocultas. Vanesa descifra la clave de la caja fuerte de Eduardo y conoce la verdad. Ella pone en marcha su ataque.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Una misma mujer despierta sentimientos encontrados entre padre e hijo y, sin pensarlo, su mirada los convierte en rivales entre el pasado y el presente. Inés quiere que Aurora y Federico se pongan de acuerdo, pero este trata de sobrepasarse con Aurora.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad and make stellar versions of these bistro favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Cakes baked in Bundt and tube pans are popular for a variety of reasons. These pans make cakes that are especially attractive, and the cakes themselves tend to be pretty simple to prepare. In this episode, we make angel food and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop the perfect pumpkin cheesecake recipe, but we never figured it would take 30 cheesecakes to develop a great recipe worthy of the finest holiday dinner.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we take two modern classic desserts —a chocolate volcano cake and caramelized pears—and make them approachable for the home cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our hearty frittata is just as filling as an omelet, but a whole lot easier to prepare and serve. We also uncover the formula for the ideal quiche filling and deliver a tender, buttery pastry crust filled with moist, smooth custard.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we look at a few of our favorite Tex-Mex dishes: tomato salsa, quesadillas, and beef tacos.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make two hearty soups: black bean and tortilla.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more synonymous with fall than butternut squash? In this episode, we explore two main-course squash recipes: a creamy, comforting soup perfect for serving on a busy weeknight and a rich, hearty risotto suitable for entertaining.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We investigate inexpensive steaks and find out which were worth eating and how best to prepare them. We also take a look at a classic accompaniment to steak: mashed potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When most people think of dishes like lasagna and jambalaya, they think of labor-intensive weekend meals. In this episode, however, we develop versions that could be prepared on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie Morrison makes host Bridget Lancaster iconic Sliders. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Julia Collin Davison to a tasting of ketchup. Bryan Roof makes Julia Croque Monsieur.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes Julia Collin Davison Greek Chicken. Jack Bishop challenges Bridget Lancaster to a tasting of crumbled feta, and Adam Ried reviews liquid measuring cups. Lawman Johnson makes Crushed Red Potatoes with Garlic & Herbs.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Hosts Julia Collin Davison and Bridget Lancaster make Cheesy Stuffed Shells. Equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for 13 by 9-inch broiler-safe baking dishes. Bryan Roof makes Julia Eggplant Pecorino.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes host Bridget Lancaster One-Batch Fried Chicken. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Julia Collin Davison to a tasting of strawberry spreads. Christie Morrison makes North Carolina Cheese Biscuits.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes her favorite picnic chicken; a fast tortellini salad with cherry tomatoes, arugula, and pine nuts; and Pimms cup for a crowd.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's weekend plans include her favorite cast-iron chicken chilaquiles with homemade hot sauce, refreshing micheladas, and restaurant-inspired fried ice cream cake.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes a celebratory dinner inspired by Italy: fresh halibut puttanesca, garlicky broccolini, crispy polenta triangles, and olive-oil yogurt cake for dessert.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Two old-fashioned dishes with modern appeal: Boston baked beans and chicken and dumplings. Neither requires fancy ingredients or expensive equipment, just a little time and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's for Sunday dinner? Around many American tables, it's meat and potatoes. Beef brisket is a good choice and a nice change from pot roast or beef stew. Although inexpensive and simple to prepare, brisket does pose some challenges to the cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There are certain dinners we rely on again and again. We are particularly fond of roasting chicken and potatoes together in one pan. While the chicken roasts, its juices drip onto the potatoes, giving them a wonderfully rich crust and creamy flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We develop a foolproof preparation for pork chops with vinegar and peppers—a modern version tangy and juicy enough to rival that prepared by an Italian grandmother. Next, we turn to pan-roasted pork tenderloin.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tuna, which is often served rare to medium-rare, can be particularly tricky to get just right with a nicely seared crust. As for halibut, we developed a technique that ensured perfect texture without a loss of flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some people are intimidated by the thought of preparing fish. Traditional dishes, like Fish Meunière, can seem even more daunting. But you don't need to be wearing a toque to prepare this French classic well.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most Italian recipes seem startlingly easy to prepare, requiring just a few simple ingredients. But some dishes need special care to reach their full potential. In this episode, we demystify two Italian classics: Fettuccine Alfredo and Beef in Barolo.

programme.desc: At the antiques market, Gon discovers a foolproof way to appraise valuable items.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dark Blue Moon
programme.desc: Jotaro welcomes a new member to the team and the group leaves for Singapore by ship. Along the way, a young stowaway is found and Jotaro comes under attack, but is the child the source of this latest evil?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Strength
programme.desc: Jotaro’s group is rescued when they spot a giant cargo ship, but they soon find that the only occupant is a strange orangutan. Curious, they begin to explore the ship and solve its mysteries.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jotaro and his companions finally make it to a hotel in Singapore, but soon Polnareff falls into a trap set by a dangerous and brutal enemy.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yellow Temperance
programme.desc: Joseph uses his Stand to generate a spirit message from a TV, only to receive a warning claiming that Kakyoin is a traitor. Meanwhile, Jotaro, Ann and Kakyoin are out exploring Singapore when Kakyoin begins acting strangely.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The Joestars' group arrives in India, where Polnareff is attacked by a Stand only visible through a mirror. As terrifying as it is, the Stand could also be related to his sister's murder.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Emperor and the Hanged Man Part 2
programme.desc: When Avdol is struck down defending Polnareff, the Frenchman goes into a state of shock, leaving him vulnerable. That is when "Hanged Man," Centerfold's Stand, begins its most furious attack.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Empress
programme.desc: Jotaro and the others next head toward Varanasi. On their way there, Joseph realizes his arm is quite swollen. At first, it doesn't bother him much, but the bigger it gets, the creepier it looks.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Jotaro and his group head toward Pakistan by car. Polnareff is behind the wheel on a dangerous mountain road when a mysterious vehicle starts impeding their progress.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Former cop Nogami Reika starts a PE business but her office is ravaged by mafia group she extorts.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: The extorted money was for the widow of her dead partner, evidence points to a corrupt police officer.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: An orphan poetess is harassed by pervs. They try to find out if she's the granddaughter of their boss.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Ryou goes to a beautiful hairdresser, but her siblings discover stolen money in an abandoned building.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: After receiving instructions from their leader, Chrollo, the Phantom Troupe converges in the city.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon, Killua and Leorio start gathering funds in order to bid on the game "Greed Island.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phillip Serrell has taken a commanding lead but Jonathan Pratt is determined to catch him up as they go into day four of their trip. Today they start buying in Gainsborough and end up in Lincoln for the auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Jonathan Pratt's last day to claw back some profit to try and catch the mighty Phil Serrell as they motor from Sheffield to auction in Wilmslow.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis take to the road as they go head-to-head to try and make the most profit from buying and selling antiques. They start their journey in Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, and end up at the auction in Grimsby.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis continue to battle it out, starting in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, and ending up at an auction showdown in Diss, Norfolk.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning is close on the heels of James Lewis as they battle it out to become king or queen of antiques profits. Winding through the English countryside, they start in Fakenham ending up with an auction in Aylsham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Lewis has nudged ahead in the antique profit stakes but Anita Manning is fighting back hard. It's still all to play for as they start the day's journey in Needham Market, Suffolk, and end with an exciting auction in Bedford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last day for Anita Manning to snatch the lead from James Lewis as they start in Woburn in Bedfordshire and end up at a gripping auction in Cirencester, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the first day for Charlie Ross and James Braxton to take to the road, and what a day it is! Their adventures start in the Highlands of Scotland in a small town called Cromarty and end in Buckie at a record-breaking auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: After the excitement of yesterday's auction James Braxton has a long way to go to catch Charlie Ross. Beginning in the fishing village of Cullen in the Highlands of Scotland, they end up in Aberdeen for the auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton battle it out for antiques as they wind through Scotland, starting in Tarland en route to auction in Hamilton.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton cruise for antiques in their classic 1954 Alpine Sunbeam which takes them through the scenic town of Blairgowrie to Glasgow for the auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's been an incredible week for Charlie Ross who is well in front of James Braxton as they fight to become the king of buying and selling antiques. They start their final day in Kilbarchan and end at an auction showdown in Ayre, Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Veteran road tripper David Barby joins up with silver expert Margie Cooper for a mammoth journey from Northumberland to Lincolnshire in their classic car. Each expert aims to buy and auction antiques for profit but it's not plane sailing.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day two and experts David Barby and Margie Cooper are battling it out in County Durham before winding their way to the auction in Scarborough.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow looks back at some favourite finds from the past 40 years while a selection of experts reveal what happened next to some memorable items.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow is in the elegant surroundings of Eltham Palace in south London. Once the boyhood home of Henry VIII, it was extended in the 1930's to include a striking art deco mansion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at Erddig, north Wales, for this week's Roadshow. On a scorching hot day, the crowds come out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Crathes Castle in Aberdeenshire and its beautiful gardens host a Roadshow with a distinctly Scottish flavour, with signed Harry Potter books and ornate silver from Iona.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at Cromer seafront in Norfolk. As visitors crowd the promenade and the pier, the experts uncover some real treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to the historic Buckfast Abbey in Devon, currently commemorating 1,000 years of worship on the site. On a perfect summer's day, the grounds of the abbey are packed with visitors bearing their treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This week, the Roadshow comes from the Concorde Hangar at the recently opened Aerospace Bristol museum. As ever, the items turning up offer an exciting and eclectic mix for the experts to examine.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is in Yorkshire at the glorious Piece Hall in Halifax, the only surviving 18th-century cloth hall where textiles were once traded. Treasures include a Chinese imperial robe, an opal pig, and a stunning sapphire brooch.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow is at Wrest Park in Bedfordshire, a grand house built in the style of a French chateau. Treasures turning up include a dazzling diamond and ruby pendant.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This week, the Roadshow rolls into Manchester's Media City UK, home to some of Britain's best-loved television programmes, including Blue Peter and Coronation Street.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from the elegant surroundings of Eltham Palace, just a few miles from the heart of London. Fiona Bruce will be exploring the Art Deco wing of the Palace.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at some species with unusual styles of consuming food, including the gigantic blue whales and the flamboyant flamingos.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Isolated and unstable mountains test the survival skills of wildlife in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Savannahs are dynamic, energy-rich worlds of grasses and trees.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Animals and plants find ingenious ways to survive in the desert.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: The rare and beautiful wildlife along the coasts of Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: With an abundance of sunlight and rainfall, plants dominate in African rainforests.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Wildlife in and around Africa's waterways.

programme.title: Wild France
programme.desc: France's ancient shrub, meadow and tree areas are among the most unique ecosystems in Europe.

programme.title: Wild France
programme.desc: Observing life in the typical ecosystems of Europe.

programme.title: Wild France
programme.desc: Highlighting animals include the red squirrel and the lynx of the Jura Mountains, and the guillemot of Brittany's rugged sea cliffs.

programme.title: Wild France

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The customers call the shots at a rowdy Staten Island bar where they pour their own drinks and cook their own food, so Jon tries to help the owners retake control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must deflate the ego of a Puerto Rican bar owner who berates his staff and sons as his bar sinks further into debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In order to save a failing Queens dive, Jon has to quell the raging tempers of three loudmouthed, firefighting brothers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon shows up to help a former Philadelphia detective turned bar owner who has been hitting the bottle too hard after years on the force.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon enlists a failing bar owner's ex-wife and former manager to help get the business back on course.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An outrageous owner spends more time swinging from the rafters than managing his bar, and Jon is ready to abandon the rescue if the owner doesn't face reality.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A third-generation Milwaukee bar owner takes his father's legacy for granted and refuses to take on the inherited mantle of leadership.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An Irish bar owner's American dream threatens to go up in smoke when Jon discovers he's been withholding employees' paychecks to keep the business afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is tasked with rescuing a Chicago sports bar that's heavy on managers and light on respect for the owner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The hippie-dippie owner of a Chicago music venue is more concerned with the spirit of wonderment than appealing to her trendy community, so Jon introduces some tough love.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A failing beachfront bar is shut down after rodents invade the kitchen, and Jon is brought to tears by what the owners have endured.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon crashes the party at a failing bar where out-of-control bartenders would rather dance than pour drinks.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When the owner of an outdated college sports bar would rather spend his time playing fantasy football, Jon gives him a dose of reality.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: At a castle-themed bar, Jon must contend with a surly tyrant of an owner whose unruly temper has pushed his employees to their breaking points.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Garner go undercover as a two-on-two street basketball team to solve a young athlete's murder. CJ becomes involved with an amorous, honeymooning Midwestern tourist.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A rock concert and political rally are the backdrop for a chilling assassination plot that finds CJ unconscious on an explosive-laden Scarab heading for the crowded pier.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A dispute between Mitch's lifeguard career and his father's desire to have him take over the family architecture business becomes intensified by devastating news about the elder Buchannon.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ and Stephanie travel to Catalina Island for a "girls-only” weekend getaway, only to be distracted by two handsome men, leading to a life and death encounter. When Mitch and Hobie hire a gorgeous Swedish au pair, amorous complications ensue.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Stephanie cope with an odd assembly of UFO enthusiasts camping on the beach in anticipation of an extraterrestrial visitation. Smugglers threaten Summer to recover diamonds they hid inside a surfboard Slade gave her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards set sail on a romantic cruise, only to encounter a dangerous fugitive, who forces Mitch and Stephanie overboard into the stormy Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While on a vacation cruise, the Baywatch lifeguards encounter high seas hijackers, leaving Mitch and Stephanie stranded in the stormy Pacific, and Summer, Matt, CJ, and Guido faced with outwitting ruthless killers who have overtaken the ship.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An escaped psychopath takes Summer and Stephanie hostage in a lifeguard tower, necessitating a thrilling subterranean rescue attempt by Mitch and Matt.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch finds himself falling for an Italian actress who is being stalked by ruthless robbers. Meanwhile, CJ and Stephanie help Guido pretend to be a lifeguard in order to impress his visiting mother.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When he risks his life to save three teenagers, Mitch fractures his spine and is paralyzed. Hobie, Stephanie, and Sophie, his physical therapist, rally to repair his shattered life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Paralyzed during a heroic rescue, Mitch undergoes a vigorous rehabilitation regimen. Meanwhile, Jason, a ten-year-old paraplegic, is pursued by a hitman trying to keep him from testifying against gangsters.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch coaches Matt in an amateur kickboxing tournament, but the competition turns deadly when an enemy from Mitch's past gets him into the ring. Meanwhile, CJ, seduced by a fashion photographer, considers leaving Baywatch for a modeling career.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch contends with an unorthodox, risk-taking Australian lifeguard, and rekindles his love affair with a beautiful journalist, Kaye Morgan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's ex-wife flies in for a weekend visit. She introduces her new fiancé Ken and informs Mitch she is taking Hobie back to Ohio with her. When Ken's private jet crashes in the ocean on takeoff, the Baywatch team have to rescue them!

programme.title: Bellator 237: Fedor vs Rampage
programme.desc: East meets West when Bellator MMA invades Tokyo with a stacked card that features MMA superstar Fedor Emelianenko and Rampage Jackson colliding in a long-awaited showdown. Also in action are Bellator stars Michael Chandler and Michael “MVP” Page.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Forum in LA. Darrion Caldwell takes on Adam Borics in the quarter-finals of the Featherweight World Grand Prix. In the main event, Julia Budd defends her Featherweight World Title against Cris Cyborg.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Known for their impressive fast finishes, 'Easy' Ed Ruth meets undefeated Yaroslav Amosov in anything but an easy fight as the two face off in the welterweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator 242: Bandejas vs Pettis
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back from the Mohegan Sun Arena with a night of fast-paced action as Sergio Pettis battles Ricky Bandejas in a bantamweight title-elimination fight, while Jason Jackson clashes with dangerous veteran Jordan Mein at welterweight.

programme.title: Bellator 243: Chandler vs Henderson II
programme.desc: Former MMA World Champions Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson look to settle things once and for all after their first unforgettable battle ended in a razor-thin split decision in Chandler’s favor.

programme.title: Bellator 244: Bader vs Nemkov
programme.desc: It's a highly anticipated battle for light heavyweight supremacy as double-champ Ryan Bader puts his 205 lb. title on the line against Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator 245: Machida vs Davis
programme.desc: A long-awaited rematch between two of the best light heavyweights in the world. Phil “Mr. Wonderful” Davis collides with Lyoto “The Dragon” Machida in battle.

programme.title: Bellator 246: Archuleta vs Mix
programme.desc: A bantamweight world title is on the line as hard-charging Juan “The Spaniard” Archuleta collides with undefeated submission machine Patchy “No Love” Mix.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: From the Mohegan Sun Arena, reigning Bellator Lightweight and Featherweight World Champion Patricio Pitbull defends his title against the relentless Emmanuel 'El Matador' Sanchez in a long awaited rematch.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you the kind of neighbor who loans a cup of sugar and always waves hello, or do you keep to yourself and call the cops the minute you hear loud music? Dr. Phil talks to guests who say they definitely don't live in Mr. Roger's neighborhood!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer Pt. 1. Dr. Phil tells the real story & meets the real people who knew the real monster that was Dahmer. Hear from the sister of a victim saying the Netflix series glorified the man she calls "Satan," also two men tortured by Dahmer.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The dangers of teenage sex & underage drinking continues. Plus, in 2011, Rehtaeh, 15, was raped by four classmates , & after intense bullying, the teen took her own life. Then, Alexis, who says she too was raped at 15. A powerful cautionary tale. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Keirsten claims her boyfriend, Mike, has slammed her face into the car radio and repeatedly hit her in the head, giving her several black eyes and a bloody lip. Although Mike's been arrested twice for domestic battery, she loves him and he's a great dad.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes goes inside the unthinkable: making your own child sick to fulfill a disturbing need for attention. The idea might sound unimaginable, but for people with a psychological disorder called Munchausen by Proxy, it's irresistible.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tensions run high in this father/daughter battle conclusion. McKinley, 18, confronts her dad for allegedly being "abusive" in her childhood & a "pedophile," claims he denies. Dr. Phil questions Cory on an incident leading to Cory's sexual battery arrest.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Carol & Tab's 20-year-old son, Alex, was killed by a hit-and-run driver. They believe that Alex's death was no accident claiming Rob, 24, of being responsible. Rob, joined by his family, say he's falsely accused & part of an "unrelenting witch hunt".

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dana says daughter Melanie, 23, is a drug abuser whose behavior is ripping apart their peaceful family. Melanie admits to experimenting with drugs but says she's not addicted & she blames her mom for pushing her buttons and causing her to lose her cool.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A 17-year-old football star accused of rape -- and the alleged victim, a 16-year-old classmate -- speak out about how one alcohol-fueled night changed their lives in an instant. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Victoria wrote to Dr. Phil after she says her daughter, Jessica, 18, physically attacked her on multiple occasions, leaving a gash in her head from a cellphone & her house damaged, as well as her body bruised after a Thanksgiving day family throw down.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Divorced in 2007, Doug & Beverly are against each other, citing drug use, abuse, & parental alienation. They admit their son, 15, & daughter, 9, are stuck in the middle. Can these exes stop pointing the finger and come together for the sake of the kids?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Did Rebecca Zahau take her own life or foul play? Questions surrounding the woman's death have the family in search of answers. Attorney Anne Bremner & private investigator Paul Ciolino reveal possible evidence. Rebecca's sister Mary talks about her life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his discussion with Willie Jessop, former spokesperson for the FLDS and former bodyguard of self-proclaimed prophet Warren Jeffs. Jessop comes face-to-face with former FLDS members and critics who say they don't believe a word he says.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Elsa says she was abused daily & beaten with ropes, chains, whips & umbrellas by the people she thought were her adoptive parents, Joe and his wife, Evangeline. Elsa says the abuse lasted for 19 years until an unlikely person stepped up to rescue her.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Comedian Chelsea Handler is joining Drew to discuss everything from her rumored return to late night and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest topics like why Cher says she shouldn't be called an icon and the recent opinion piece on tipping that has people debating.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Abbott Elementary" star Lisa Ann Walter is joining Drew as a co-pilot all show long and talking all about "Abbott Elementary" and working with Lindsay Lohan on "The Parent Trap!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew takes the show on the road to join Katy Perry on-site at her Las Vegas residency, PLAY. Then, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity interior designer Mikel Welch is doling out trendy décor tips for the one room couples fight about most in the home, the living room!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Maldito

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Viejos tiempos

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A sangre fría

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Nothing is off-limits as the Party Down South Crew gets together one last time to share their favorite memories and relive their wildest moments from all five vacations together.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: South Carolina will never be the same when eight of the biggest, baddest personalities in the south come together in one house to work hard and party even harder for one wild summer.

programme.desc: Aired 02/14/2021. Abraham Lincoln's life before political stardom, from his frontier roots to his courtship of Mary Todd Lincoln, who pushed him to great political heights.

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Aired 02/21/2021. Lincoln showed how poignant oration, political savvy and moral conviction could help a lawyer from Illinois ascend from obscurity to the White House.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/19/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty, by examining the country through personal stories, food and music.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/20/2018. People with disabilities share their views on healthcare and how they’re portrayed in media.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 06/03/2018. Examining why the existence of Historically Black Colleges and Universities in the US is important.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 06/17/2018. W. Kamau Bell heads down south to retrace his family roots and debunk some myths.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/14/2016. Homeland Security Investigations conducts an elaborate undercover sting operation to stop an illegal arms dealer.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/21/2016. After the Taliban refused to release international aid workers being held hostage in Afghanistan, the CIA, Joint Special Operations Command, and a Taliban double agent race against time to rescue them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues an unruly bicyclist, a man ducks into a drive-through in an attempt to elude police, and a deputy pulls over a stolen vehicle driven by a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer coordinates a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a vehicle which was reported stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect who was reported to have been involved in a car-jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag filled with illegal prescription drugs. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to ditch his stash in a laundromat, a nervous driver arouses suspicion, and a woman returning home from a night out finds her boyfriend has changed the locks.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous pursuit between Officers and a known meth dealer ends in an arrest. A suspect with several felony warrants is apprehended without incident. A pursuit involving a stolen motorcycle exceeds speeds of 100mph.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to jump out of a car when his friend takes him on a high-speed chase, and a deputy investigates a man he finds walking down a dark road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control of the vehicle and runs into a stop sign. With the aid of stop sticks, a driver’s car becomes disabled. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a drug house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's son Kyle returns from the war, he seeks the help of his father and the CSI team to solve a disturbing murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Spring Break raises the body count in Miami when Horatio Caine and the CSI team splits up to solve three different murders.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A victim's spirit won't leave Calleigh alone until she finds justice for his murder. She must enlist the help of Horatio and the rest of the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly perfect jewelry heist ends in murder and when crime scene evidence is stolen from the lab, and Delko returns to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a suburban soccer mom is murdered, the CSIs uncover her family's dark past, while Delko continues his undercover mission.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's ex-girlfriend is killed in an explosion, the team looks within their own department to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts the CSIs by leaving them cryptic hints, and the longer it takes them to decode these puzzles, the higher the death toll rises.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team suffers the tragic loss of one of their own when a psychotic genius runs wild in otherwise beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must search through Miami's most elite guest list to find her killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and the CSIs' only witness is a blind man, who heard the abduction, leading Horatio to an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the killer of Horatio's wife busts out of prison and goes on a rampage, they must determine what he's after and find him before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, the CSIs investigate the cast, the obsessed fans, and the stars' hidden pasts to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man claims to have dreamed of a murder before it happened, Horatio must send Natalia undercover for the team to determine the truth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a sugar refinery explodes, Horatio Caine and the CSI team make a shocking discovery about one of the factory's employees.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y Speedle investigan cuando un ladrón y violador ha sido agredido sexualmente y atado con cintas a los pilares de su cama después de que lo mataron por asfixia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo se exponen a radiación mientras investigan un asesinato, lo que los lleva a un abogado ambientalista que se muere de envenenamiento por radiación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar el asesinato de un inmigrante de Europa del Este asesinado a puñaladas en una cabina de espectáculos eróticos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se apresuran para encontrar nuevas pruebas para un juicio en curso por asesinato para evitar la condena de un hombre posiblemente inocente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se suponía que era un viaje encubierto de rutina al incinerador para deshacerse de pruebas de drogas, pero emboscan a los oficiales de policía.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El caso de Horatio de una mujer asesinada se ve comprometido cuando se involucran los agentes federales, que tienen su propio plan a seguir.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un ex-convicto que Horatio envió a la cárcel le pide que lo ayude a encontrar a su hijo desaparecido. Él encuentra marihuana mientras busca en la habitación del chico.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Estudiantes de todo el país van a Miami para pasar una semana de diversión bajo el sol. La fiesta se interrumpe cuando llaman al equipo de CSI a dos casos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle y Delko están disfrutando de un lugar nocturno de moda en Miami, Club Descent, cuando la pirotecnia del DJ desencadena un incendio que arrasa al club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en la cultura de las drogas después de que ocurre un brutal asesinato y una explosión casi fatal en la casa de un adicto a la metanfetamina.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando llaman a Horatio al Centro de Detención de West Miami para investigar a un preso asesinado, termina presenciando la fuga de tres presos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que una joven modelo es asesinada por un conductor que se da a la fuga, Horatio investiga al dueño del auto, que afirma que se lo prestó a los invitados a su fiesta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un hombre arponeado a su yate lleva a Horatio al mundo de la búsqueda de tesoros en la actualidad y a la enorme codicia que viene aparejada.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se llevan a la fenómeno del tenis Lana Walker de su habitación por la noche y la única evidencia que tienen para continuar es una fibra púrpura encontrada en el marco de la ventana.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a man in full clown costume shoots a bakery owner, the CSIs investigate and discover a decision from Flack's past that may put him in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a Spanish club promoter is found dead, Detective Mac Taylor must battle with the head of Barcelona's crime lab to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.desc: Después de la horrible muerte de su compañero, el detective y escritor Alex Cross se ha refugiado en la paz de su retiro. Pero cuando un criminal brillante (Michael Wincott) secuestra a la hija de un senador, Alex debe volver a la acción.

programme.title: Un plan sencillo
programme.desc: Dos hermanos encuentran cuatro millones de dólares en una avioneta caída e intentan quedarse con el dinero, pero la paranoia, la codicia y el miedo a ser capturado hacen que su plan esté fuera de control, con consecuencias desastrosas.

programme.title: Lágrimas de cristal
programme.desc: Un ranchero muy apuesto mantiene un apasionado romance con la mujer del hombre más poderoso del pueblo, Fausto Rodriguez, quien no está acostumbrado a perder y establecerá una fuerte rivalidad con el muchacho.

programme.title: El asesinato de Nancy Lyon
programme.desc: Cuando Nancy Lyon muere inesperadamente por envenenamiento por arsénico, su familia cree que su engañoso esposo lo hizo. Incluso con todas las pruebas que apuntan a su esposo, él puede presentar pruebas de que su esposa sufrió una depresión severa.

programme.title: Jane
programme.desc: Anne Hathaway ofrece una brillante interpretación como una joven y amorosa Jane Austen en esta divertida e interesante comedia, explorando un romance indescriptible que inspiró las novelas de uno de los autores más célebres del mundo.

programme.title: Dos vidas contigo
programme.desc: ¿Quién sabía que cuando pidiera el especial, recibiría el plato de su vida? David Duchovny y Minnie Driver encienden chispas en esta historia afectuosa sobre un viudo y una camarera que parecían estar destinados a conocerse y enamorarse.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Las Aparicio: La película
programme.desc: La exitosa serie “Las Aparicio” se traduce al cine y narra la historia de una familia de mujeres, pero; víctimas de una maldición, son viudas y no pueden concebir niños varones, por lo que deben unirse para resolver el secreto detrás de su viejo hogar.

programme.title: Padre soltero
programme.desc: Ben Affleck, Jennifer López y George Carlin protagonizan esta comedia irresistible. Un relato sincero sobre un hombre que de repente es un padre soltero, aprendiendo que debe aceptar su identidad y reconocer lo que lo hace feliz.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: Un mafioso atrapa a dos ladrones de autos mientras le roban y les da una semana para conseguirle un Ferrari clásico. Si no, podrían perderlo todo.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Mcquade, el lobo solitario
programme.desc: Un inconformista guarda forestal de Texas (Chuck Norris) deja las armas por las artes marciales cuando se enfrenta al líder de un grupo de traficantes de armas.

programme.title: Fled: Corre por tu vida
programme.desc: Una divertida e ingeniosa aventura de acción. Fled sigue el rastro de dos prisioneros fugitivos en su carrera por encontrar un alijo oculto y un disco incriminatorio, que podría terminar con la mafia cubana o matarlos.

programme.title: El vengador del futuro
programme.desc: Es el año 2084 D.C.y a Doug Quaid lo persiguen sueños recurrentes de un viaje a Marte, el planeta vecino más cercano a la Tierra. Vive en una época que ha sobrevivido otra guerra mundial y donde las elecciones para el gobierno ya no existen.

programme.title: El Pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: La ciudad del pecado (Sin City)
programme.desc: En estas historias entrecruzadas, un universo de héroes improbables y reacios, intentan hacer lo correcto en una ciudad a la que ya no le importa nada.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos. Desde sus humildes inicios en un pequeño escenario hasta llegar a las brillantes luces de Hollywood.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: El contratista
programme.desc: Un grupo de jóvenes combatientes militares internacionales se une a su duro líder veterano para proteger a un niño cuya familia fue asesinada. Ahora deben descubrir quiénes son los buenos y los malos antes de que todos terminen muertos.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Tod@s caen
programme.desc: Tras su éxito en la taquillera pelicula No Manches Frida 2, Omar Chaparro y Martha Higared llegan a la gran pantalla con la divertidísima comedia romántica TODOS CAEN.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Sumergidos
programme.desc: En lo que debería ser una misión de rescate rutinaria, el submarino USS Tiger Shark encuentra a tres sobrevivientes del ataque de un submarino. Pronto, los visitantes parecen desencadenar una serie de sucesos escalofriantes y de otro mundo.

programme.title: 666: The Child (LAS)
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita en vuelo. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un único sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adoptó pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica comienza a convocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano / cuidador no está durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo.

programme.title: Klowns asesinos
programme.desc: Cuando aterriza una nave con forma de carpa de circo y una tripulación de payasos alienígenas, la policía se muestra escéptica, pero al poco tiempo descubren que han venido para convertir a los habitantes de la Tierra en algodón dulce.

programme.title: Ghoulies
programme.desc: Cuando un universitario hereda una vieja mansión, descubre que también ha heredado a sus residentes: un puñado de criaturas viscosas y peludas que harán cualquier cosa por él… incluso matar.

programme.title: La maldición gitana
programme.desc: Un abogado obeso accidentalmente corre y mata a una anciana gitana. Después de que su viejo lo maldice, él comienza a perder peso y no puede parar. Basado en la novela de Stephen King, escrita bajo el seudónimo de Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: Mientrtas Donna y Vic Trenton luchan para salvar tambaleante su matrimonio, su hijo Tad se hace amigo del adorable San Bernardo de 90 kilos de su mecánico.

programme.title: Aulas peligrosas
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de secundaria descubren que el cuerpo docente está bajo el control de parásitos alienígenas. Con el guion inteligente de Kevin Williamson “Scream” y dirigida por Robert Rodriguez “From Dusk Till Dawn”.

programme.title: A Toda Madre: A Toda Madre
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand y Seth Rogen son el dúo cómico perfecto al embarcarse en un gran viaje. Cuando Andy invita a su madre a un viaje de 8 días y 4800 kilómetros por el país, cuanto más lejos viajan, más cercanos se vuelven.

programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: Howard es un profesor de literatura y está a punto de casarse, pero todo se complica cuando uno de sus ex-alumnos gana un Oscar y se lo dedica a su “profesor homosexual”.

programme.title: Pootie Tang: luce tu cuerpo y lo gozarás
programme.desc: Cuando la guerra unipersonal de Pootie contra la avaricia, la injusticia y los productos poco saludables comienza a afectar las ganancias de Lecter Corp, el demente director ejecutivo logra desmoronarlo, ¡golpeando su cinturón mágico!

programme.title: Partes privadas
programme.desc: Partes privadas cuenta la increíble transformación de Howard Stern, de cerebrito a superestrella de los medios.

programme.title: Una noche sin luna
programme.desc: Durante la víspera del Año Nuevo, tres personajes solitarios viajan a una pequeña ciudad perdida en el campo uruguayo y, a través de sus caminos, tendrán la oportunidad de cambiar sus destinos.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Evolución
programme.desc: Un recluta de bombero, dos profesores universitarios, y la geek científica enviada por el gobierno, luchan contra un organismo alienígena que ha evolucionado rápidamente desde que llegó a la tierra dentro de un meteorito.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Los jóvenes y vibrantes neoyorquinos Alex y Nancy encontraron un lugar perfecto para establecerse y compartir un futuro brillante: la planta baja de un hermoso y viejo dúplex. Pero su nuevo hogar viene con un accesorio permanente que no esperaban.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Guys and Dolls
programme.desc: In New York, a gambler is challenged to take a cold female missionary to Havana, but they fall for each other, and the bet has a hidden motive to finance a crap game.

programme.title: Fiddler on the Roof
programme.desc: Tevye the Milkman is a Jewish peasant in pre-Revolutionary Russia trying to support his family and maintain his Jewish tradition under a Czar that would like to run his people out of town.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: His mother (Angela Lansbury) expects him to climb the corporate ladder. But Elvis would rather wear an aloha shirt than a white collar, so he goes to work as a tour guide. Lucky Elvis: his first customers are a car full of cuties.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He’s a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: On his last day in the Navy, frogman Elvis discovers a sunken treasure ship. On his first day as a civilian, Elvis starts his new job—self-employed treasure hunter!

programme.title: G.I. Blues
programme.desc: Elvis adopts an on-screen persona he knows well in real life-a singin' G.I. in West Germany. Eager to open a stateside nightclub after his hitch in khakis, he takes part in a wager to raise the dough he needs.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case of amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville…and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While spending time at the Lorenzo's home, Gloria admires a statue replica of Rodin's 'The Kiss.' Seeing the admiration in Gloria's eyes, Irene gives her the statue. However, Archie is infuriated by it, citing that it's pornography.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A computer error leads Edith into collecting a small fortune in quarters sent to her in the mail by a prune company. When Archie discovers this, he immediately wants to keep the money and doesn't want Edith to say anything to the company.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is all excited when the Lorenzos and Lionel are coming over after dinner for a game of 'Group Therapy.' Archie takes one look at some of the questions that are asked during a game and quickly rushes off for drinks at Kelsey's bar.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie becomes concerned when Edith begins attending Irene Lorenzo's church. Edith also begins wearing a Catholic medallion and gets literature on how to be Catholic. This leads Archie to believe that Irene is trying to convert Edith to Catholicism

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude uses her position as director of Tuckahoe's Bicentennial musical extravaganza to create a tribute to American women -- a theme that hardly thrills Walter, Arthur, and the colonel in charge of the armory where the show is to be staged.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck is ready to become an American citizen -- but her test turns from mental to physical when she learns she has a serious illness. The Findlay's frustration over her forgetfulness changes to concern when she is admitted to the hospital.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's unfailing loyalty to her nephew Steve stretches very thin, and so does Walter's patience, when it becomes evident that his 'free and easy' lifestyle is just a cover-up for his basic lack of responsibility.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude refuses to accept the idea that a noted literary authority would choose to lunch with Vivian at the exclusion of herself. But, when she confronts the two of them, the reality of the situation becomes painfully clear.

programme.title: Maude
